title: triticum turgidum subsp. timopheevii
intro: Triticum turgidum subsp. timopheevii is a subspecies of wheat that is native to the Caucasus region and is also known as Timopheev's wheat. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Triticum turgidum subsp. timopheevii include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood sugar levels. Triticum turgidum subsp. timopheevii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used as a dietary supplement in the form of flour or whole grain.
